Welcome back. So I hinted to it in the last lesson and now it's time to build your blue ocean bridge. So this is really a transition between the belief shifts you just wrote and what will eventually be the product or offer that satisfies those beliefs. So this is the first time I'll really start seeding your product. You know, really talking about either the intellectual property within it or aspects of your offer that really align with the beliefs you just disrupted and installed in the last lesson. So at a very high level, what you're coaching is buy in on your method solution or IP before making the offer. Now that's the important thing I want to highlight here. It's much easier for a prospect to agree on something before there's a reason to resist it, which is, you know, when you ask them to exchange time or money or any kind of investment. The second aspect, which I really want to highlight here and we've alluded to it already, is that it must be uniquely and exclusively capable of satisfying those agreements. So that's what we're doing here. We really want to coach the fact that this is a blue ocean solution that uniquely satisfies all those things you just had them buy into on the belief, belief front. So there is literally no other solution that does this. And when you do this, while you literally create an uncontested category of one, you know, beyond comparison or price shopping or any of the other things that might interfere with that conversion. So you'll see how this plays out in the examples, but first here's a basic framework of how to write your blue ocean bridge. So you'll start off by introducing your IP, your method, your system without making the offer. And then you will list out those moment of highest pleasure benefits that they'll enjoy as a result of doing it. So that's that. That's it at a very high level. I do suggest on this one that you watch some of the example breakdowns to see how even though this short section may seem pretty simple, it actually plays out in a very important way in transitioning to the offer. So check out the examples in the next video. And when you do feel ready, sit down and write your blue ocean bridge.
